Off Calendar Sep-29-2023 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-31-2023 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-24-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendants Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-21-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Jason Wolford, Esq. 415-649-6203 Wolford Wayne for Plaintiff.
Brandon Gnekow, Esq. 415-625-9258 Wilson Elser Moskowitz Edelman & Dicker LLP for Defendant

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

RULING - ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF MATTHEW DIKMAN's Motion To Compel Defendants Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

The Court vacates the tentative ruling. The motion is moot, responses have been provided. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1000.00.

Mr. Wolford to submit a proposed form of order in word format to the Judge Pro Tem at JPDeol@dhillonlaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: John-Paul Deol, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
